description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:16.04 Docker image and defines a single build stage named build. Add a job called build-deb-linux-amd64 in the build stage that runs the following shell commands in order: apt-get update, apt-get install -y pbuilder, pbuilder create, pbuilder build *.dsc, and cp -r /var/cache/pbuilder/result ./ . The job should publish the resulting files in the result directory as an artifact. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
